mapper.select:
{ CALL ${schema}..USP_MTRL_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblMtrlMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlDesc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{smplCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custPrc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salePrc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{factPrc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purcPrc ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sizeNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lnth ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dpth ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hght ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hght2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cbm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wght ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlCtgr1 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlCtgr2 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtrlCtgr3 ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{setYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bomYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mtoYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stdYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCtgr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instSeatType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instUrl ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instImgPath ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pstnNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyCost ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ndlvyYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thrDlvyYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvyLt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnvtMtrlCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnvtMtrlNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnvtQty ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cnvtUnit ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR},
